// Helper function to map chain IDs to Revoke.cash chain names
  const getRevokeCashChainName = (chainId: number): string | null => {
    const chainMap: Record<number, string> = {
      1: 'ethereum',
      8453: 'base',
      42161: 'arbitrum',
      137: 'polygon',
      10: 'optimism',
      56: 'bsc',
      43114: 'avalanche',
      59144: 'linea',
      534352: 'scroll',
      5000: 'mantle',
      324: 'zksync',
      250: 'fantom',
      100: 'gnosis',
      42220: 'celo',
    }
    return chainMap[chainId] || null
  }
